FHA mortgage calculator for Florida

Estimate your full FHA monthly payment — principal, interest, mortgage insurance, taxes, and insurance — with our free Florida FHA calculator.

Thank you!

An FHA mortgage specialist will reach out shortly with your personalized Florida rate quote.

FHA Payment Estimator

FHA mortgage calculator for Florida

Estimate your monthly FHA payment in seconds. Adjust the sliders below for home price, down payment, rate, and term to see principal & interest, FHA mortgage insurance, and estimated taxes and insurance — the full picture of a Florida FHA payment.

Your loan details

Estimates only — get a quote for exact figures.

Loan amount (incl. upfront MIP)$346,500

Estimates use a 0.55% annual MIP, 1.75% upfront MIP financed into the loan, 1.0% property tax and 0.6% insurance. Actual figures vary. Not a loan offer.

What's included in the estimate

The calculator finances the 1.75% upfront FHA mortgage insurance into your loan, adds the annual MIP (about 0.55%/yr) to your monthly payment, and estimates Florida property taxes (~1% of price) and homeowners insurance (~0.6%). Your real numbers depend on your county, exact rate, and insurance quote — get a personalized quote for precise figures.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

How accurate is this FHA calculator?+
It gives a close estimate using typical FHA assumptions (1.75% upfront MIP financed, ~0.55% annual MIP, ~1% property tax, ~0.6% insurance). Your exact payment depends on your county, rate, and insurance quote.
Does the calculator include FHA mortgage insurance?+
Yes. It adds the upfront MIP into the loan and includes the monthly annual MIP in your estimated payment.
Are property taxes and insurance included?+
Yes, as estimates based on Florida averages. Actual amounts vary by county and property, and Florida insurance can vary widely.
What down payment should I enter?+
FHA's minimum is 3.5% with a 580+ score. You can model higher down payments to see how the payment changes.
